notes: OWASP publishes many reference documents and projects covering web application security, AI/LLM security, mobile security, and more. This reference-type entry covers OWASP project documentation and reference materials. Other OWASP SecID entries: control/org/owasp (Top 10s as control frameworks), methodology/org/owasp, weakness/org/owasp, entity/org/owasp.

data.description: Living open-source resource on AI/ML security threats, controls, and best practices. Continuously updated reference document covering adversarial ML, LLM security, and AI governance.
